scenes.description: Biboo and Fubuki finishing their performance of 'Lonely Rolling Star'.
Post-game interaction. Biboo celebrates her win while Fubuki lies defeated.
Todoroki Hajime is introduced and challenges Biboo to a rhythm dance battle.
Biboo and Hajime perform 'Cirno's Perfect Math Class'.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！勝った！勝った！
subtitles.english: Yay! I won! I won!

subtitles.original: あれは使っちゃった、Biboo...
subtitles.english: You used that thing, Biboo...

subtitles.original: アヘヘ、ボコボコにされちゃったよ〜
subtitles.english: Ahehe, I got beaten to a pulp~

subtitles.original: コインが〜！イェーイ！
subtitles.english: The coin~! Yay!

subtitles.original: You got the coin! Yay!
subtitles.english: You got the coin! Yay!

subtitles.original: I'm the winner!
subtitles.english: I'm the winner!

subtitles.original: 可愛いから許して！
subtitles.english: Forgive me because I'm cute!

subtitles.original: しょうがない、許す。可愛いからね！
subtitles.english: I have no choice but to forgive you. Because you're cute!

subtitles.original: じゃ、次の世界へ、Biboo!
subtitles.english: Now, to the next world, Biboo!

subtitles.original: かかってくるがいい！
subtitles.english: Come at me!

subtitles.original: おっけー、じゃ、先輩、おねがい！
subtitles.english: Okay, then, Senpai, please!

subtitles.original: はーい、いくぞー！レッツゴー、コセキ！
subtitles.english: Alright, let's go! Let's go, Koseki!

subtitles.original: Todoroki Hajime Joins the Battle!
subtitles.english: Todoroki Hajime Joins the Battle!

subtitles.original: Rhythm Dance Battle
subtitles.english: Rhythm Dance Battle

subtitles.original: Hajime? What?!
subtitles.english: Hajime? What?!

subtitles.original: これが欲しければ、拙者と勝負だ！
subtitles.english: If you want this, you'll have to face me!

subtitles.original: My coin!
subtitles.english: My coin!

subtitles.original: うー、はじめのダンスについて来られるかな？
subtitles.english: Ooh, I wonder if you can keep up with Hajime's dancing?

subtitles.original: Dance? Hmm...
subtitles.english: Dance? Hmm...

subtitles.original: Okay! Let's dance together!
subtitles.english: Okay! Let's dance together!

subtitles.original: みんなー！チルノのさんすうきょうしつはじまるよー！
subtitles.english: Everyone! Cirno's math class is starting!

subtitles.original: あたいみたいな天才目指して、がんばっていってね！
subtitles.english: Aim for a genius like me and do your best!

subtitles.original: がんばっていってね！
subtitles.english: Do your best!

subtitles.original: キラキラダイアモンド
subtitles.english: Kira kira diamond

subtitles.original: 輝く星のように
subtitles.english: Shining like a star

subtitles.original: 栄光 志望校 なんとかして入ろう
subtitles.english: Honor, dream school, I'll get in somehow

subtitles.original: 天才 秀才 トップ目指して GO GO!
subtitles.english: Genius, prodigy, aiming for the top, GO GO!

subtitles.original: バーカ バーカ バーカ バーカ バーカ バーカ...
subtitles.english: Dummy, dummy, dummy, dummy, dummy, dummy...

subtitles.original: ちょっと、バカじゃないもん！
subtitles.english: Hey, I'm not a dummy!

subtitles.original: 「バカ」っていうほうがバカなのよ！
subtitles.english: The one who says 'dummy' is the dummy!

subtitles.original: 何よ、うるさいわね！このバカ！
subtitles.english: What was that? You're annoying! You dummy!

subtitles.original: 紅魔館からバスが出て
subtitles.english: A bus left from the Scarlet Devil Mansion

subtitles.original: 始めに三人乗りました
subtitles.english: At first, three people were on board

subtitles.original: 白玉楼で一人降りて
subtitles.english: One person got off at Hakugyokurou

subtitles.original: 半人だけ乗りました
subtitles.english: Then half a person got on board

subtitles.original: 八雲さんちで一人降りて
subtitles.english: One person got off at Yakumo's place

subtitles.original: 二人降りて
subtitles.english: Two people got off

subtitles.original: 結局乗客合計何人だ？
subtitles.english: So, how many passengers total?

subtitles.original: 答えは 答えは 0人 0人
subtitles.english: The answer is, the answer is 0! 0!

subtitles.original: なぜなら なぜなら それは
subtitles.english: Because, because, that is...

subtitles.original: 幻想郷にバス無い
subtitles.english: There are no buses in Gensokyo!

subtitles.original: 山落ち 意味など無いわ
subtitles.english: Climax and resolution are meaningless

subtitles.original: キャラクター立てばいいのよ
subtitles.english: Characters just need to stand out

subtitles.original: 元気があればなんでも
subtitles.english: If you have energy, you can do anything!

subtitles.original: ① ② ⑨!
くるくる時計の針
subtitles.english: Spinning round, hands of the clock

subtitles.original: ぐるぐる頭まわる
subtitles.english: Spinning round, my head's spinning

subtitles.original: だって つぶら目玉 二つしかないのに
subtitles.english: I mean, even though I only have two round eyes

subtitles.original: 三本の針なんて ちんぷんかん
subtitles.english: Having three hands is all Greek to me

subtitles.original: 次々問題出る
subtitles.english: The questions keep coming

subtitles.original: まだまだ授業続く
subtitles.english: The class still goes on

subtitles.original: 凍る部屋の中 ひんやりした温度も
subtitles.english: Inside the frozen room, even the chilly air

subtitles.original: 時間も気にせず ゆっくりしていってね！
subtitles.english: Without worrying about time, just take it easy!

subtitles.original: だからバカじゃないって言ってるでしょ！
subtitles.english: I'm telling you, I'm not a dummy!

subtitles.original: いい加減にしないと 凍結するわよ
subtitles.english: If you don't stop, I'll freeze you!

subtitles.original: そして粉々になって死ねばいいのよ！
subtitles.english: Then you can just break into pieces and die!

subtitles.original: 霊夢んとこの百万延の
subtitles.english: Reimu's one-million-yen worth of...

subtitles.original: 壺を誰かが割っちゃった
subtitles.english: Someone broke her jar!

subtitles.original: 永遠亭のえーりんが
subtitles.english: Eirin from Eientei

subtitles.original: 弁償に来ましたよ
subtitles.english: She came to pay the reparations

subtitles.original: 知らんぷりのイタズラでね
subtitles.english: Pretending not to know, with a prank

subtitles.original: 結局賠償金額いくら？
subtitles.english: So, how much is the compensation in the end?

subtitles.original: 答えは 答えは 0円 0円 なぜなら なぜなら それは
subtitles.english: The answer is, the answer is 0 yen! 0 yen! Because, because, that is...

subtitles.original: そんな壺あるわけない
subtitles.english: There's no way such a jar exists!

subtitles.original: 常識超えたところに
subtitles.english: In a place beyond common sense

subtitles.original: 世界の真理がある
subtitles.english: The truth of the world lies there

subtitles.original: 秘密の数字目指して
subtitles.english: Aiming for the secret numbers

subtitles.original: ① ② ⑨!
ヘラヘラニヤけながら
subtitles.english: While grinning and smirking

subtitles.original: ゲラゲラ笑いながら
subtitles.english: While laughing and cackling
